manualVisualAudit.intent: Completion state is now the primary screen event, with visible reward metrics and a dominant next-lesson action.
manualVisualAudit.palette: White surface with green, orange, and blue reward accents; no one-note palette.
manualVisualAudit.depth: Single elevated completion surface with supporting status and action rows.
manualVisualAudit.surfaces: Tenant-user and referral-user use consumer shell; operator/admin roles retain their existing shells.
manualVisualAudit.typography: Compact dashboard-scale type; no hero-scale copy inside constrained panels.
manualVisualAudit.spacing: Desktop and mobile screenshots show stable stacks without overlap.
manualVisualAudit.signature: Completion progression, streak, and next lesson are visible in the first viewport.
manualVisualAudit.rejects: No internal engineering vocabulary found on tenant-consumer pages.

resolvedFindings.issue: The populated completion screen looked like a small receipt and did not make the next lesson action dominant.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Expanded the submitted state into a stronger completion surface and added a primary Start next lesson CTA.

resolvedFindings.issue: Freelancer Phase 2 visual evidence captured the form state instead of the populated completion state.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Updated the visual spec to capture freelancer with mock=submitted while preserving the portfolio shortcut assertion.
